body.title: D330: Context format test — CSB vs prose per model
body.result: D330 finding: prose beats CSB on BOTH token efficiency and quality. CSB pipe delimiters tokenize poorly (+7% tokens). Prose quality: 0.69-1.00 vs CSB 0.62-0.88. Recommendation: render TWM context as natural language, not CSB. Test at tests/test_context_format.py.
body.description: Same prompt + memories in structured CSB vs natural language prose. Run against Ollama local, haiku, sonnet. Measure response quality + token count. Determines if structure saves tokens without losing quality.
